name: bzip2
description: bzip2, a block-sorting file compressor.  Version 1.0.8, 13-Jul-2019.
intents: bzip2, a block-sorting file compressor.  Version 1.0.8, 13-Jul-2019.

name: xz
description: Compress or decompress FILEs in the .xz format.
intents: Compress or decompress FILEs in the .xz format.

name: gunzip
description: Uncompress FILEs (by default, in-place).

name: zcat
description: Uncompress FILEs to standard output.

name: column
description: Columnate lists.

name: expand
description: Convert tabs in each FILE to spaces, writing to standard output.
intents: Convert tabs in each FILE to spaces, writing to standard output.

name: unexpand
description: Convert blanks in each FILE to tabs, writing to standard output.
intents: Convert blanks in each FILE to tabs, writing to standard output.

name: fold
description: Wrap input lines in each FILE, writing to standard output.
intents: Wrap input lines in each FILE, writing to standard output.

name: fmt
description: Reformat each paragraph in the FILE(s), writing to standard output. The option -WIDTH is an abbreviated form of --width=DIGITS.
intents: Reformat each paragraph in the FILE(s), writing to standard output. The option -WIDTH is an abbreviated form of --width=

name: paste
description: Write lines consisting of the sequentially corresponding lines from each FILE, separated by TABs, to standard output.
intents: Write lines consisting of the sequentially corresponding lines from each FILE, separated by TABs, to standard output.

name: rev
description: Reverse lines characterwise.

name: shuf
description: or:  shuf -e [OPTION]... [ARG]...

name: split
description: Output pieces of FILE to PREFIXaa, PREFIXab, ...; default size is 1000 lines, and default PREFIX is 'x'.
intents: Output pieces of FILE to PREFIXaa, PREFIXab, ...; default size is 1000 lines, and default PREFIX is 'x'.

name: tsort
description: Write totally ordered list consistent with the partial ordering in FILE.
intents: Write totally ordered list consistent with the partial ordering in FILE.

name: comm
description: Compare sorted files FILE1 and FILE2 line by line.
intents: Compare sorted files FILE1 and FILE2 line by line.

name: join
description: For each pair of input lines with identical join fields, write a line to standard output.  The default join field is the first, delimited by blanks.
intents: For each pair of input lines with identical join fields, write a line to standard output.  The default join field is the
each pair of input with join

name: csplit
description: Output pieces of FILE separated by PATTERN(s) to files 'xx00', 'xx01', ..., and output byte counts of each piece to standard output.
intents: Output pieces of FILE separated by PATTERN(s) to files 'xx00', 'xx01', ..., and output byte counts of each piece to stan

name: who
description: Print information about users who are currently logged in.
intents: Print information about users who are currently logged in.

name: loginctl
description: Send control commands to or query the login manager.
intents: Send control commands to or query the login manager.
or query the login with loginctl

name: hostnamectl
description: Query or change system hostname.

name: timedatectl
description: Query or change system time and date settings.
intents: Query or change system time and date settings.

name: localectl
description: Query or change system locale and keyboard settings.

subcommands.name: list-keymaps
subcommands.description: Show known virtual console keyboard mappings

subcommands.name: list-x11-keymap-models
subcommands.description: Show known X11 keyboard mapping models

subcommands.name: list-x11-keymap-layouts
subcommands.description: Show known X11 keyboard mapping layouts

subcommands.name: list-x11-keymap-options
subcommands.description: Show known X11 keyboard mapping options

intents: Query or change system locale and keyboard settings.
show known virtual console keyboard mappings (localectl)
show known x11 keyboard mapping models (localectl)
show known x11 keyboard mapping layouts (localectl)
show known x11 keyboard mapping options (localectl)

name: nice
